# Structure of COREFL folder

The structure of the current COREFL folder is:

- code/
  - docs/*
  - example/*
  - src/
    - gxl_lib/*
    - stat_lib/*
    - *
  - tools/*
  - CMakeLists.txt
- readGrid/*

The `code` folder contains the COREFL codes, documentations, example cases, and some tools can be used. The `readGrid` folder contains a tool used for reading structured grid generated from Gridgen / Pointwise in Plot3D format. The concrete usage of them will be discussed throughout the documentation.
